title: Categories
subtitle: Manage your expense categories — each has a color and icon for classification and charts.

default.notDeletable: The default category cannot be deleted.

form.reactivateHint: If the name matches a deleted category, that category will be restored.

delete.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete.body: This category will no longer appear when creating new data, but all historical data is preserved. You can review deleted categories by turning on "Show deleted categories".

empty.title: No categories yet
empty.body: The categories list is currently empty.
